Bash(PYTHONPATH=. python -c "
import ast
with open\('atlas/infrastructure/data_manager.py'\) as f:
    tree = ast.parse\(f.read\(\)\)
for node in ast.walk\(tree\):
    if isinstance\(node, ast.AsyncFunctionDef\) and 'quarterly' in node.name.lower\(\):
        print\(f'{node.name}: line {node.lineno}-{node.end_lineno}'\)
")

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings\('ignore'\)
from atlas.strategy.ipo_module import IPOModule

results = IPOModule._fetch_upcoming_sync\(\)
print\(f'Active subscriptions: {len\(results\)}'\)
for r in results:
    print\(f'{r[\\"code\\"]} {r[\\"name\\"]} | sub={r[\\"subscription_price\\"]} | mkt={r[\\"market_ref_price\\"]} | spread={r[\\"spread_pct\\"]}% | {r[\\"start_date\\"]}~{r[\\"end_date\\"]} | {r[\\"recommendation\\"]}'\)
" 2>&1)

from atlas.infrastructure.twse_bulk import fetch_twse_daily_all, fetch_twse_institutional, last_trading_date
from datetime import date

df = fetch_twse_daily_all\(\)
print\(f'Trading date used: {last_trading_date}'\)
print\(f'Stocks fetched: {len\(df\)}'\)
if not df.empty:
    print\(df[['code','name','close','change_pct','volume_lots']].head\(5\)\)
else:
    print\('Empty DataFrame - no data returned'\)
" 2>&1)
